---
title: "Postbaccalaureate Research"
listing:
  contents:
    - "/PostbacResearch"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Currently, I am a post baccalaureate researcher as part of an NSF RaMP Program at the University of Kansas in the Department of Ecology and Evoltuionary Biology, specifically within the division of Paleobotany. I am working with Dr. Brian Atkinson and Dr. Kelly Matsunaga to describe and taxonomically place Cretaceous-age fossilized fruit specimens from Antarctica.
